titleStmt.title: SII 9.31: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 31. (A.R. No. 17 of 1917.) ON A BROKEN HERO-STONE IN A FIELD TO THE WEST OF THE VILLAGE HEMAVATI, MADAKASIRA TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 888, Kshaya (= A.D. 966-67) with no further details and refers itself to the reign of the Noḻamba-Pallava king Iṟiva-Noḻambādhirāja. In a battle (?) between Mosaḷeyarasa of Jagaḷapura and Ayyapadēva, son of Noḻambādhirāja and Piriyabbarasi, a certain Eṟeyamma is said to have fought rousing the admiration of all and died. Peṁjjeru (modern Hēmāvati) is mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . saka nṛpakaḷātītasaṁvatsa
raśataṅgaḷeṇṭunūra Eṇbhatteṇṭaneya kṣayasaṁvatsa
radoḷ śrīmadiṟivanoḻaṁbādhirājara manōnayana
vallabheyarappa śrīmat piriyabarasiyara ma
ganayyapadēvage jagaḷapurada mosaḷeyarasara pa

ṭṭadēraṇigarakusaṟegaṁ
Ēraṇigeṟeganaṁ dhāriṇiyoḷagellaṁ pōrante pogaḷvara
ḷavalla gaṇḍinoḷāruṁ doreye bhuvanavaḷeyadoḷ ga
ṇḍavātina pempaṁ kaṇḍu kēḷdellarummaṇḍaladoḷage poga
ḻdappareṟeyamma gaṇḍagaṭṭaḷeyādoṁ bhuvanadoḷ
Aṭṭideleya mātanneṭṭane kēḷdintudaṭṭaḷseraguṁ beraga

vaṁ bageyade kaṭṭaḷsattaneṟeyamma nōḍaveḷegedappi rū
ḍhiyoḷesedirppa nīṁ pogaḻade te paḍivandammāḍi
daṁ pogaḻiveṟegana jāralcu kēḷa peṁjjeṟellaṁ poga
ḻalke vīṟana sāvu kateyāgi paredudu mūṟuvī
lōkadūḷagella .
Digital edition of SII 9.31 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
